title: mitracarpus schizangius
intro: Mitracarpus schizangius, also known as "Palo de aceite" or "Palo de aceite de la Sierra", is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is primarily found in Mexico and Central America. Mitracarpus schizangius has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's leaves and stems are used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues, promoting overall health and well-being.
